modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Stop receiving Cortana Daily Briefing emails from Microsoft.

full_description_text: User wants to unsubscribe from emails. They keep getting messages from cortana@microsoft.com. The subject line is always "Your daily briefing." Need to figure out how to make these stop. It's annoying and cluttering the inbox.
short_description: Stop receiving Cortana Daily Briefing emails from Microsoft.
description: User wants to unsubscribe from emails. They keep getting messages from cortana@microsoft.com. The subject line is always "Your daily briefing." Need to figure out how to make these stop. It's annoying and cluttering the inbox.
